mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PM_TRADE ( EXEC_ID, ORDER_ID, EXCH_ORDER_ID, STRATEGY_ORDER_ID, SIDE, SYMBOL, CURRENCY, ORD_TYPE, LAST_QTY, LAST_PX, LAST_AMT, BYSUBESS_TYPE, COUNTERPARTY, EXCH_ID, MATCH_TIME, MATCH_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_TIME, UPDATED_TIME ) VALUES ( #{execId}, #{orderId}, #{exchOrderId}, #{strategyOrderId}, #{side}, #{symbol}, #{currency}, #{ordType}, #{lastQty}, #{lastPx}, #{lastAmt}, #{businessType}, #{counterparty}, #{exchId}, #{matchTime}, #{matchDate}, #{status}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} )
